context: Change in diagnostic approach / therapy: in 27% Indications: √  tip of tube 4-6 cm above carina with neck in neutral position: √  migration by 2 cm inferiorly with flexion √  migration by 2 cm superiorly with extension √  tube diameter should be ½ to ⅔ of tracheal lumen √  diameter of inflated balloon should be less than diameter of trachea Cx: (a)  Tracheal damage (stenosis / rupture) if ratio of cuff to tracheal lumen > 1.5 Cx:   placement into branch vein / anomalous vein (eg, persistent left SVC), intraarterial placement, extravascular placement FDA Recommendation: RA √  may not be on film
